---
title: "Jenny Höglauer"
image: images/jenny.jpg
about:
  template: trestles
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/JennyHoeglauer
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:jenny.hoeglauer@outlook.com
    - icon: linkedin
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/jenny-h%C3%B6glauer-62b429254/
---

## Welcome to my Portfolio!

I am Jenny Höglauer, a Double Degree student in **Global Business Studies** at Dublin City University, Ireland and **International Management** at ESB 
Business School, Germany. Currently based in Dublin, I am combining my passion for finance, strategy and data analytics with hands-on international experience.

This portfolio showcases my academic projects, professional experience and personal development, from machine learning and entrepreneurship to 
international business and beyond.

Feel free to explore my work and get in touch!
